case_title: FRANCIS ASILUM et al VS. PETER BRUCE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ASILUM, FRANCIS ASILUM, MARY KAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA  PETER BRUCE PHOTOGRAPHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED JUN-13-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA  PETER BRUCE PHOTOGRAPHY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-02-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA  PETER BRUCE PHOTOGRAPHY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASILUM, FRANCIS ASILUM, MARY KAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA  PETER BRUCE PHOTOGRAPHY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BRUCE, PETER DBA  PETER BRUCE PHOTOGRAPHY
